h2. Direction

Implement the rollout v1.0~v2.0 with incremental validation (no behavioural change — process-focused)

h2. Background

Previous iteration focused on offline validation.
Current phase extends to live environments with staged rollout,
plus a feedback loop applied to each integration window.

h2. Approach

Define targets + phases + validation gates + feedback loop

h2. Success criteria

Three consecutive phases pass without regression in all tracked metrics

h2. Dependencies
* Previous phase completed
* Hardware budget approved (~next quarter)

h2. Milestones

~end of quarter: integration checkpoint reached + qualitative sign-off complete

h2. Schedule

week 1~week 8

📚 *Reference*: [milestones page|https://example.com/pages/milestones]
